Name: ResourceItemParam
Description: Defines Resource Items, aka Spirit Emblems/Regenerative Power Fragments

Fields.Description: Sfx that appears when a Resource Item is placed in a map
Sfx when Resource Item is travelling towards you
Sfx spawned when Resource Item hits the player
Prevents this Resource Item from being obtained until this Action is unlocked in ActionUnlockParam
Set the minimum initial velocity of the flying object. The initial speed is randomly determined between the minimum and maximum initial speeds.
Set the maximum initial velocity of the flying object. The initial speed is randomly determined between the minimum and maximum initial speeds.
Set the maximum speed when flying. Even if you accelerate, the speed will not exceed this speed.
Even if the flying item does not reach the player, it will be forcibly retrieved after this time has elapsed.
